Overtime Pay Calculator

Calculate your overtime earnings. Enter your hourly rate and overtime hours to see your total pay including overtime premium.

FAQ

What is overtime pay?

Overtime pay is additional compensation for hours worked beyond the standard 40-hour work week, typically at 1.5x your regular hourly rate.

When does double time apply?

Double time (2x rate) typically applies after 12 hours in a single day or on the 7th consecutive day worked, depending on state law.

Is overtime mandatory?

Under the FLSA, non-exempt employees must receive overtime pay for hours over 40 per week. Some states have additional daily overtime rules.
